---
title: "Merna Saad"
page-layout: full
toc: false
css: styles.css
---

```{=html}
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/gsap.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/ScrollTrigger.min.js"></script>

<div class="hp2">

  <!-- HERO SECTION -->
  <div class="hp2-hero">
    <div class="hp2-hero-left">
      <div class="hp2-photo-frame">
        <img src="../assets/Merna.png" alt="Merna Saad" class="hp2-photo" />
        <div class="hp2-pin"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="hp2-badge">Open to Work</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hp2-hero-right">
      <h1 class="hp2-name">Merna Saad</h1>
      <p class="hp2-subtitle">MSBA, UCSD Rady 2026</p>
      <p class="hp2-tagline" id="hp2-tagline"></p>
      <div class="hp2-buttons">
        <a href="mailto:msaad@ucsd.edu" class="hp2-btn hp2-btn-filled">Email</a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/merna-s-saad" class="hp2-btn">LinkedIn</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/merna-saad" class="hp2-btn">GitHub</a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/messaging/compose/?to=merna-s-saad" class="hp2-btn hp2-btn-brass">Message Me</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- STATS STRIP -->
  <div class="hp2-stats">
    <div class="hp2-stat">
      <span class="hp2-stat-num" data-target="10">0</span>
      <span class="hp2-stat-label">Years in Finance</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hp2-stat">
      <span class="hp2-stat-num" data-target="3">0</span>
      <span class="hp2-stat-label">Industries</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hp2-stat">
      <span class="hp2-stat-num" data-target="2">0</span>
      <span class="hp2-stat-label">Degrees</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hp2-stat">
      <span class="hp2-stat-num" data-target="6">0</span>
      <span class="hp2-stat-label">Analytics Projects</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- SKILLS: Sticky notes on a board -->
  <div class="hp2-section">
    <h2 class="hp2-section-title">Skills</h2>
    <div class="hp2-board">
      <div class="hp2-sticky hp2-sticky-navy" style="transform: rotate(-2deg);">
        <div class="hp2-sticky-header">Languages</div>
        <div class="hp2-sticky-items">Python, SQL, Excel VBA, Git</div>
      </div>
      <div class="hp2-sticky hp2-sticky-brass" style="transform: rotate(1.5deg);">
        <div class="hp2-sticky-header">ML & Stats</div>
        <div class="hp2-sticky-items">Regression, Classification, Clustering, XGBoost, NLP, A/B Testing</div>
      </div>
      <div class="hp2-sticky hp2-sticky-navy" style="transform: rotate(-1deg);">
        <div class="hp2-sticky-header">Tools</div>
        <div class="hp2-sticky-items">Jupyter, Tableau, Plotly, ETL Pipelines</div>
      </div>
      <div class="hp2-sticky hp2-sticky-brass" style="transform: rotate(2.5deg);">
        <div class="hp2-sticky-header">Business</div>
        <div class="hp2-sticky-items">Financial Modeling, Credit Analysis, Strategic Planning, Portfolio Management</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- TIMELINE: Career + Education -->
  <div class="hp2-section">
    <h2 class="hp2-section-title">My Journey</h2>
    <div class="hp2-timeline" id="hp2-timeline">

      <div class="hp2-tl-item hp2-tl-right" data-year="2026">
        <div class="hp2-tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="hp2-tl-card">
          <div class="hp2-tl-date">2025 - 2026</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-role">M.S. Business Analytics</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-place">UCSD Rady School of Management</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-tag hp2-tl-tag-edu">Education</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="hp2-tl-item hp2-tl-left" data-year="2023">
        <div class="hp2-tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="hp2-tl-card">
          <div class="hp2-tl-date">2020 - 2023</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-role">SVP, Strategic Venture Manager</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-place">Bank of Egypt</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-desc">Led strategic analytics projects analyzing 15+ sectors. Built interactive dashboards in Tableau and Plotly. Presented insights to cabinet ministers.</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-tag hp2-tl-tag-work">Work</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="hp2-tl-item hp2-tl-right" data-year="2020">
        <div class="hp2-tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="hp2-tl-card">
          <div class="hp2-tl-date">2018 - 2020</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-role">Manager, Corporate & Credit</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-place">Corplease S.A.E</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-desc">Managed client acquisition pipeline. Built dashboards in SQL to track sales KPIs. Led team of 6 analysts.</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-tag hp2-tl-tag-work">Work</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="hp2-tl-item hp2-tl-left" data-year="2018">
        <div class="hp2-tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="hp2-tl-card">
          <div class="hp2-tl-date">2016 - 2018</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-role">Senior Officer, Corporate & Credit</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-place">Corplease S.A.E</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-desc">Built automated ETL pipelines in Python that cut credit assessment time by 40%.</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-tag hp2-tl-tag-work">Work</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="hp2-tl-item hp2-tl-right" data-year="2016">
        <div class="hp2-tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="hp2-tl-card">
          <div class="hp2-tl-date">2014 - 2016</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-role">Officer, Corporate & Credit</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-place">Corplease S.A.E</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-tag hp2-tl-tag-work">Work</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="hp2-tl-item hp2-tl-left" data-year="2014">
        <div class="hp2-tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="hp2-tl-card">
          <div class="hp2-tl-date">2009 - 2014</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-role">B.S. Architectural Engineering + B.B.A. Finance</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-place">The American University in Cairo</div>
          <div class="hp2-tl-tag hp2-tl-tag-edu">Education</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ACADEMIC PROJECTS -->
  <div class="hp2-section">
    <h2 class="hp2-section-title">Academic Projects</h2>
    <div class="hp2-projects">
      <a href="../projects/ab-testing/" class="hp2-project-card">
        <img src="../assets/project1.png" alt="A/B Testing" />
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
(function() {
  if (typeof gsap === 'undefined') return;
  gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);

  // Typing tagline
  var tagline = 'Engineering mindset. Strategic vision. Data driven.';
  var el = document.getElementById('hp2-tagline');
  if (el) {
    var i = 0;
    function typeIt() {
      if (i < tagline.length) { el.textContent += tagline.charAt(i); i++; setTimeout(typeIt, 40); }
    }
    setTimeout(typeIt, 600);
  }

  // Stats counter
  document.querySelectorAll('.hp2-stat-num').forEach(function(num) {
    var target = parseInt(num.getAttribute('data-target'));
    ScrollTrigger.create({
      trigger: num,
      start: 'top 85%',
      onEnter: function() {
        gsap.to(num, {
          textContent: target,
          duration: 1.5,
          ease: 'power2.out',
          snap: { textContent: 1 },
          onUpdate: function() { num.textContent = Math.round(parseFloat(num.textContent)); }
        });
      },
      once: true
    });
  });

  // Sticky notes entrance
  document.querySelectorAll('.hp2-sticky').forEach(function(sticky, i) {
    gsap.fromTo(sticky,
      { y: 40, opacity: 0, rotation: 0 },
      {
        y: 0, opacity: 1,
        rotation: parseFloat(sticky.style.transform.replace('rotate(', '').replace('deg)', '')) || 0,
        duration: 0.6, ease: 'back.out(1.4)',
        scrollTrigger: { trigger: sticky, start: 'top 85%', once: true },
        delay: i * 0.1
      }
    );
  });

  // Timeline items entrance
  document.querySelectorAll('.hp2-tl-item').forEach(function(item, i) {
    var isLeft = item.classList.contains('hp2-tl-left');
    gsap.fromTo(item,
      { x: isLeft ? -40 : 40, opacity: 0 },
      {
        x: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.7, ease: 'power3.out',
        scrollTrigger: { trigger: item, start: 'top 85%', once: true }
      }
    );
  });

  // Timeline line drawing
  var timeline = document.getElementById('hp2-timeline');
  if (timeline) {
    gsap.fromTo('.hp2-timeline::before',
      { scaleY: 0 },
      { scaleY: 1, duration: 2, ease: 'power2.out',
        scrollTrigger: { trigger: timeline, start: 'top 80%' }
      }
    );
  }

  // Hero entrance
  gsap.fromTo('.hp2-hero-left', { x: -50, opacity: 0 }, { x: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.8, ease: 'power3.out' });
  gsap.fromTo('.hp2-hero-right', { x: 50, opacity: 0 }, { x: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.8, ease: 'power3.out', delay: 0.2 });
  gsap.fromTo('.hp2-stats', { y: 20, opacity: 0 }, { y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power3.out', delay: 0.5 });

  // Project card hover
  gsap.utils.toArray('.hp2-project-card').forEach(function(card) {
    card.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() { gsap.to(card, { y: -6, duration: 0.3, ease: 'power2.out' }); });
    card.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { gsap.to(card, { y: 0, duration: 0.3, ease: 'power2.out' }); });
  });
})();
</script>
```
